zh.Madresfield, Malvern Hills District, Wor: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lygon於大約1547年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德時，他的父親William Lygon36歲，母親Eleanor Dennis33歲。他於1584年與Frances Dennis在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年8月14日在英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾可斯同享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lygon于大约1547年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德时，他的父亲William Lygon36岁，母亲Eleanor Dennis33岁。他于1584年与Frances Dennis在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年8月14日在英国格盧斯特斯爾艾爾可斯同享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lygon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possiblyalso an Americanized form of German   Leisen  .

variants.name: Lison
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from Lison in Calvados and Jura, France.
Welsh and English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Leyshon  .
Slovak (Lisoň) and Polish (Lisoń): descriptive nickname for a bald man, from a derivative of lisý ‘bald’ (see Lis ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lygon was born about 1547, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lygon, was 36 and his mother, Eleanor Dennis, was 33. He married Frances Dennis in 1584, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 14 August 1603, in Elkstone, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Frances Dennis en 1584, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1603, à Elkstone, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lygonが約1547年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで生まれた時，父William Lygonは36歳，母Eleanor Dennisは33歳であった。1584年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでFrances Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年8月14日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエルクストーンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lygon(이)가 대략 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lygon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Dennis(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1584년 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 Frances Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 8월 14일 영국 그루스스터실르 엘크스톤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lygon родился около 1547 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lygon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Dennis, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Dennis в 1584 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 августа 1603 г. в местности элкстоун, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
